title: habenaria lisenarum
intro: Habenaria lisenarum is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Habenaria lisenarum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
